cpho_yu_yichao_2009: Yu Yichao (俞颐超) was a first-prize winner at the 2009 CPhO (全国中学生物理竞赛, China National High School Physics Olympiad, the 26th edition) (1st place nationwide / theoretical), representing 北京, 人大附中. CPhO first-prize winners are the top ~50 high-school physicists in China each year, with the top 5-6 typically selected for the IPhO China team. Many alumni go on to undergraduate physics or related fields at Peking University, Tsinghua University, or top US institutions.
